name: Supplier Detailed Statement
query:
WITH opening_balance AS (

    SELECT
        IFNULL(SUM(debit_amount),0) - IFNULL(SUM(credit_amount),0) AS opening_balance
    FROM (

        SELECT
            pi.grand_total AS debit_amount,
            0 AS credit_amount
        FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
        WHERE
            pi.docstatus = 1
            AND pi.supplier = %(supplier)s
            AND pi.posting_date < %(from_date)s
            AND (%(company)s IS NULL OR %(company)s = '' OR pi.company = %(company)s)

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            0 AS debit_amount,
            pe.paid_amount AS credit_amount
        FROM `tabPayment Entry` pe
        WHERE
            pe.docstatus = 1
            AND pe.payment_type = 'Pay'
            AND pe.party_type = 'Supplier'
            AND pe.party = %(supplier)s
            AND pe.posting_date < %(from_date)s
            AND (%(company)s IS NULL OR %(company)s = '' OR pe.company = %(company)s)

    ) x
),

report_data AS (

    SELECT
        %(from_date)s AS posting_date,
        "Opening" AS voucher_type,
        "" AS voucher_no,
        "الرصيد الافتتاحي" AS description,
        NULL AS qty,
        "" AS uom,
        NULL AS rate,
        0 AS discount_amount,
        0 AS display_debit,
        0 AS display_credit,
        ob.opening_balance AS calc_opening,
        0 AS calc_debit,
        0 AS calc_credit,
        "0-opening" AS group_key,
        0 AS sort_order,
        0 AS idx

    FROM opening_balance ob

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        pi.posting_date,
        "Purchase Invoice" AS voucher_type,
        pi.name AS voucher_no,
        CONCAT("مشتريات رقم ", pi.name) AS description,
        NULL AS qty,
        "" AS uom,
        NULL AS rate,
        0 AS discount_amount,
        0 AS display_debit,
        0 AS display_credit,
        0 AS calc_opening,
        0 AS calc_debit,
        0 AS calc_credit,
        CONCAT("1-", pi.name) AS group_key,
        1 AS sort_order,
        0 AS idx

    FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
    WHERE
        pi.docstatus = 1
        AND pi.supplier = %(supplier)s
        AND pi.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
        AND (%(company)s IS NULL OR %(company)s = '' OR pi.company = %(company)s)

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        pi.posting_date,
        "" AS voucher_type,
        "" AS voucher_no,
        pii.item_name AS description,
        pii.qty,
        pii.uom,
        pii.rate,
        IFNULL(pii.discount_amount,0),
        pii.amount,
        0,
        0,
        pii.amount,
        0,
        CONCAT("1-", pi.name),
        2,
        pii.idx

    FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
    INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice Item` pii
        ON pii.parent = pi.name

    WHERE
        pi.docstatus = 1
        AND pi.supplier = %(supplier)s
        AND pi.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
        AND (%(company)s IS NULL OR %(company)s = '' OR pi.company = %(company)s)

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        pi.posting_date,
        "" AS voucher_type,
        "" AS voucher_no,
        "الإجمالي" AS description,
        NULL,
        "",
        NULL,
        0,
        pi.grand_total,
        0,
        0,
        0,
        0,
        CONCAT("1-", pi.name),
        3,
        9999

    FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
    WHERE
        pi.docstatus = 1
        AND pi.supplier = %(supplier)s
        AND pi.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
        AND (%(company)s IS NULL OR %(company)s = '' OR pi.company = %(company)s)

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        pe.posting_date,
        "Payment Entry",
        pe.name,
        "قيد سداد للمورد",
        NULL,
        "",
        NULL,
        0,
        0,
        pe.paid_amount,
        0,
        0,
        pe.paid_amount,
        CONCAT("2-", pe.name),
        4,
        0

    FROM `tabPayment Entry` pe
    WHERE
        pe.docstatus = 1
        AND pe.payment_type = 'Pay'
        AND pe.party_type = 'Supplier'
        AND pe.party = %(supplier)s
        AND pe.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
        AND (%(company)s IS NULL OR %(company)s = '' OR pe.company = %(company)s)

)

SELECT
    posting_date AS "Date:Date:120",
    voucher_type AS "Type:Data:130",
    voucher_no AS "Document:Data:190",
    description AS "Description:Data:430",
    qty AS "Qty:Float:90",
    uom AS "UOM:Data:90",
    rate AS "Rate:Currency:120",
    discount_amount AS "Discount:Currency:120",
    display_debit AS "Debit - الصادر:Currency:150",
    display_credit AS "Credit - الوارد:Currency:150",

    SUM(calc_opening + calc_debit - calc_credit)
    OVER (
        ORDER BY posting_date, group_key, sort_order, idx
    ) AS "Balance:Currency:150"

FROM report_data

ORDER BY
    posting_date,
    group_key,
    sort_order,
    idx
